sections.markdown:
- Activity: Evening Run
- Started: 2024-02-19 18:42
- Distance: 3.7 km
- Moving time: 25:38
- Elapsed time: 27:14
- Elevation gain: 93.8 m
- Average heart rate: 160.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 182 bpm
- Average speed: 8.6 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.4 bpm`, ranging from `156.9` to `163.8 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `130.3 spm`, with a working range of `127.0` to `133.8 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `132.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `128.4 spm` (-3.8 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:00 /km` across `3.665 km` in `25:38` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:48 /km` and second-half pace was `7:11 /km` (+23 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `160.1 bpm` average and `182 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `155.6 bpm` in the first half and `164.3 bpm` in the second (+8.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `25:38` out of `27:14` elapsed (94.1%), which shows some stop-start interruption.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `73` stop segments and `23.7%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `102.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `50.2 m` and `91.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `65.0 m` in the first half and `37.8 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed earlier.
